issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2019 AUDI S3. THE CONTACT RECEIVED NOTIFICATION OF NHTSA CAMPAIGN NUMBER: 19V474000 (AIR BAGS); HOWEVER, THE PARTS FOR THE RECALL REMEDY WERE NOT AVAILABLE. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE MANUFACTURER EXCEEDED A REASONABLE AMOUNT OF TIME TO REPAIR THE VEHICLE.

narrative.headline: What 2019 Audi S3 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (100% of reports).

issues.title: Air Bags
